docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY WESTPHAL, KIERA AS TO DEFENDANT RIPALSKI, MARTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTPHAL, KIERA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RIPALSKI, MARTIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-29-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIPALSKI, MARTIN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-24-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-24-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
